name: PinterestHaley
content:
Stocksy-28499981920×1280 602 KB

Hey Pinterest Developer Community,

We wanted to reach out to acknowledge that we are aware of current delays in the app approval process, and we sincerely apologize for any disruption this may be causing to your development timelines.

Our team is actively working to resolve the backlog and get things moving as quickly as possible. We understand how important timely access is to building and launching your integrations, and we take that seriously.

In the meantime, if you have an urgent need, please don’t hesitate to submit a support ticket and flag it as high priority. Our support team will do their best to triage urgent cases as quickly as possible.

If you leave a comment or a post, please do not include your App ID or email address for privacy purposes — you may include them in your ticket as those are private to our support team!

Submit a support ticket: https://help.pinterest.com/en/contact

We appreciate your patience and continued partnership with Pinterest. We’ll share further updates as the situation progresses.

Thank you, The Pinterest API Support Team

name: Joltpost
content:
Hi Pinterest Developer team,

I submitted my app for Trial access on May 13, 2026, and it has been showing “Trial access pending” for several weeks without any update.

App details:

Purpose: A cross-platform social media scheduler that lets users connect their Pinterest account via OAuth 2.0, compose image or video pins, choose one of their boards, and publish immediately or on a schedule.

Scopes requested:

user_accounts:read - Read the connected Pinterest account on connect, including username, account type, and profile details. Also used for account-level analytics and follower count.

boards:read - List the user’s boards so they can choose where to publish a pin. Also required for pin analytics.

boards:write - Create boards from the app when the user wants a new destination board while composing.

pins:read - Read pins published through the app and support pin analytics.

pins:write - Create pins on the board selected by the user. This is the core publishing action.

The app only stores what is needed to publish on the user’s behalf, including encrypted OAuth access and refresh tokens, basic connected account profile information (id, username, avatar URL), and the board ID selected for each scheduled pin. Board lists are fetched live from Pinterest when the user opens the board picker and are never stored in our database.

Users can disconnect Pinterest at any time from the app’s settings, which revokes access and deletes the stored Pinterest tokens and profile data.

We do not collect Pinterest passwords, do not use session cookies, do not scrape Pinterest, do not access secret boards, and do not resell or share Pinterest data. Analytics are shown only to the connected account owner and are not used for ad targeting or audience profiling.

Could you please review my application? I noticed some later applications have already been approved, so I wanted to check if anything else is needed from my side.

Happy to provide any additional information.

Thank you!

name: Anna
content:
Hey Pinterest Developer Community! Another kind reminder:

We wanted to reach out to acknowledge that we are aware of current delays in the app approval process, and we sincerely apologize for any disruption this may be causing to your development timelines.

Unfortunately, we cannot speed up the process at this time so we appreciate your patience in advance!
Our team is actively working to resolve the backlog and get things moving as quickly as possible. We understand how important timely access is to building and launching your integrations, and we take that seriously.

In the meantime, if you have an urgent need, please don’t hesitate to submit a support ticket and flag it as high priority. Our support team will do their best to triage urgent cases as quickly as possible.

Please note that unfortunately, we cannot speed up the process at this time so we appreciate your patience in advance! If you leave a comment or a post, please do not include your App ID or email address for privacy purposes — you may include them in your ticket as those are private to our support team!
For updates on your trial request, submit a support ticket: https://help.pinterest.com/en/contact

We appreciate your patience and continued partnership with Pinterest. We’ll share further updates as the situation progresses.
